{"step_by_step_thinking": "The documents mention that the articular disc of the TMJ has a biconcave or oval shape. This indicates that the disc is thickest posteriorly. There is no information suggesting that the disc is narrow in the center or that it is strengthened by the lateral pterygoid muscle.
